block_00: Processing might take up to 7 days
block_01: Temporary delay in local bank transfers
block_03: Please be informed that local bank transfers are currently being processed with a delay for reasons beyond our control. We are working on increasing the transaction speed — until then, be aware that it can take up to 7 days to process.
block_04: If local bank transfer is set as your payment method, you might be interested in temporarily changing it to an alternative.
block_06: We apologize for the inconvenience. Thank you for your understanding!
